details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements. The ImageTextToTextPipeline class is properly defined with an async _call method that accepts images and text prompts. AutoModelForImageTextToText is imported and registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS with type 'multimodal'. The _call method correctly processes images via the processor, tokenizes text input, calls model.generate(), and returns objects with generated_text property. Comprehensive JSDoc documentation includes @typedef for ImageTextToTextSingle/Output/Callback/PipelineType. The implementation follows established pipeline patterns (batching logic, processor/tokenizer usage, return structure) and makes no modifications to existing classes. Minor deduction only because pixel_values handling is implicit through the processor rather than explicitly validated, though this is consistent with the codebase's existing patterns.
